MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the accounting has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

02/14/18: The Court noted that the accounting has been filed with a hearing date of April 3, 2018. The order to appear will not be issued and the status hearing is off calendar.
